15 articles

Trier Magazine

Mosel wine, wine festivals and wineries, with travel context for the Trier region.

Wine Festivals in Trier and Along the Moselle: The Complete Guide

Olewig Wine Festival, Wine in the City, Bernkastel and more: all the key wine festivals in Trier and along the Moselle, with tips on season, atmosphere, and how to get there.

Riesling Routes Along the Moselle from Trier

The most scenic Riesling routes from Trier: wine villages, steep vineyards, tastings and tours along the Moselle from Trier to Koblenz at a glance.

Sparkling Wine Cellars in Trier: Bubbly Experiences Between the Moselle and the Romans

Explore Trier's sparkling wine cellars: Bernard-Massard, traditional bottle fermentation, cellar tours and tastings in Germany's oldest city.

The Best Vinotheques in Trier: Where Mosel Wine Becomes an Experience

The finest wine bars and vinotheques in and around Trier: where to taste, buy, and enjoy Riesling from the Mosel, Saar, and Ruwer rivers.

Wine Tastings in Trier's Historic Cellars

Wine tastings in Trier's historic cellars: Roman origins, Riesling from the Mosel, Saar, and Ruwer, guided cellar tours, and tips for the perfect experience.

Mosel Wine Tours in Trier: Tastings, Winery Visits and Experiences

Mosel wine tours in Trier: tastings in the Old Town, guided winery walks along the Weinkulturpfad, river cruises and wine in the dark. Tips for wine lovers.

Wine Taverns in Trier: The Best Spots for Mosel Wine

The best wine taverns (Weinstuben) in Trier: relaxed addresses for Riesling, tapas and regional cuisine between the city center and Olewig. Tips for your wine night out.

Wine Tours by Bike Along the Moselle Near Trier

Cycling through the Moselle vineyards near Trier: the flat Moselle Cycle Route, family wineries, Riesling tastings, and tips for a relaxed tour.

Wine Seminars in Trier: Knowledge and Enjoyment of Mosel Wine

Wine seminars in Trier: learn to taste, understand Riesling and Elbling, try wine and chocolate pairings, and join guided vineyard tours along the Moselle.

Wine Traditions in Trier: 2,000 Years of Wine Culture on the Moselle

From the Romans to today: how Trier's wine traditions developed over two millennia, and why the city is regarded as Germany's oldest wine town.

Wine Hotels in Trier: Staying Among the Vineyards on the Moselle

Wine hotels in Trier and along the Moselle: romantic getaways, family stays, wellness retreats and overnights with vineyard views. Your overview for travelers who come for the food and wine.

Wine Hikes in Trier and Along the Moselle: The Most Scenic Routes Through the Vineyards

Wine hikes around Trier: the Weinkulturpfad in Olewig, the Ruwer Riesling trail, Trittenheim and the Middle Moselle. Routes, walking times and tips for hikers who like to taste as they go.

Winery Tours in Trier: A Look Behind the Scenes with Moselle Vintners

Winery tours in Trier and along the Moselle: wine cellars, tastings, sustainable viticulture and practical tips on duration, booking and grape varieties.

Organic Wineries in Trier and Along the Moselle: Sustainable Wine Country

Organic wineries around Trier and along the Moselle: cultivation methods, Riesling from steep slate slopes, certifications like Ecovin and Demeter, plus tips for tastings.

Wineries in Trier: A Guide to Vineyards, Estates, and Grape Varieties

An overview of wineries in Trier: history, leading estates, the vineyard regions along the Moselle, Saar, and Ruwer, plus grape varieties and experiences for wine lovers.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
